'''Tehk'la blades''',<ref name="spelling">''[[A Mon Alone]]'' p31; ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' p104</ref> also known as '''Tehk'lka blades'''<ref name="NGW">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' p61</ref> were handheld melee weapons used throughout [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] society.

==Description==
[[File:Nagai-TURcov.png|thumb|left|180px|A Nagai preparing to throw a tehk'la blade]]
Tehk'la blades were similar in design to [[Vibrodagger/Legends|vibrodaggers]] and featured both a serrated edge and vibration generators to aggravate damage when withdrawn from a wound.<ref name="Legacy Era Campaign Guide" /> Additionally, the blade was well balanced, capable of being used with the off hand by those who were capable of using two weapons simultaneously. The balanced blade also made it a useful throwing knife. These weapons were not simply used to battle opponents but to cripple them upon victory.

Tehk'la blades were individually crafted for the owner of the weapon, and often they were crafted by the owner himself.<ref name="Legacy Era Campaign Guide" /> During the period of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], many were made with [[Cortosis-weave|cortosis weave]] as was common with vibroblades in the Old Republic.<ref name="KOTOR 2 Prima Official Guide">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> Some [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] assassins used them for weapons.

==History==
Nagai brothers [[Vor Essen]] and [[Kor Essen]] knew how to make Tehk'la blades. When they were captured by [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] slaver [[Phylus Mon]] around 20 BBY, they would try to bribe any would-be rescuers for help to escape by crafting them specially-made Tehk'la blades.<ref name="A Mon Alone">{{LivingForce|A Mon Alone}}</ref>

Nagai military leader [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife]] was a proficient user of the Tehk'la blade. [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] that he befriended on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] were unable to pronounce his name, so they took to calling him "Knife" in [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]] for his skills with his Tehk'la blade.
